creator: grg@isabase.philol.msu.ru
text:
Fvwm2 installed from the fvwm-2.0.46 binary package doesn't start:
it complains for the absence of libkrb. What does Kerberos
has to do with fvwm2?

Fix: 

Do not link libkrb with this package.
How-To-Repeat: 
Try to install and use fvwm-2.0.46 binary package
on a system without libkrb.
